user_request: Design and verify a 50nm NMOS common-source amplifier with PMOS active load using deterministic gm/Id LUT-aware sizing and real LTspice OP/DC/AC/tran verification.

design_intent_summary.why_this_project: validate Skynet beyond CMOS inverter using a gm/Id and LUT-aware analog topology
design_intent_summary.topology: NMOS common-source device with PMOS active load
design_intent_summary.expected_output: final reproducible device sizing, biasing, plots, measurement summary, and pass/fail report

designer_level_expectations: Final report must let a human recreate the schematic and simulation manually.
Report exact W/L/m for M_NCS and M_PLOAD.
Report VIN_CM, VBP, VDD, CL, corner, temperature, model library path, and netlist paths.
Report selected gm/Id, Id, gm, gds, ft, region, saturation margin and LUT source when available.
Report OP/DC/AC/tran measurements from real LTspice raw/log data.
Do not produce inverter metrics or rail-to-rail inverter plots for this project.
optimization_expectations: Use gm/Id and LUT data for initial sizing.
Use deterministic LUT-aware candidate generation in closed-loop.
Preserve passed specs while improving failed specs.
Stop with a clear physics/LUT limit if no valid candidate exists.
